pages.name: Toad
pages.text: Entities must be inside the central $(item)Cobweb$().

pages.title: Mutation Details
pages.text: Entities:$(br)$(8)>$() 1 Ocelot$(br)$(p)Notes:$(br)One $(l:herbology/grassper)Grassper$(/l) needs to hold a $(l:artifacts/misc/attuned_stone#charged)Charged Attuned Stone$(/l), and the other three $(l:artifacts/misc/mutandis#extremis)Mutandis Extremis$(/l)$(p)Snares must be $(l:herbology/critter_snare)Slime Critter Snare$(/l).
